opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks often hinges on graceful degradation under LLM provider outages; consider a circuit-breaker pattern with automatic fallback to a secondary model or cached responses. Also, be wary of task drift—as the underlying LLM evolves, scheduled jobs may produce unexpected or suboptimal results, requiring periodic re-evaluation and adjustment. It’s a subtle but constant maintenance burden.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM requests and orchestrating tools for agent workflows directly touches on the challenges of scheduling and dependency management described in the post.
